PreToolUse.description: Dangerous command warning: prints a caution when git push --force, git reset --hard, or rm -rf is detected. Does NOT block — user keeps full control

hooks.command: bash -c 'input="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT:-}"; if echo "$input" | grep -qE "git push.*--force|git reset --hard|rm -rf"; then echo "⚠️  Dangerous command detected. Proceed with caution."; fi; exit 0'
